canvas-mist.$description: Canvas Mist — Page background, section canvases, hairline dividers and UI borders — the quiet ground on which all display type rests

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Card surfaces, navigation pill background, elevated panels, button and nav text

surface-mist.$description: Surface Mist — Subtle secondary surfaces, button hover washes, skill tag backgrounds, low-emphasis panels one step off the canvas

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary headings, body text, and icon fills on light surfaces. Hero section full-bleed background. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

steel-gray.$description: Steel Gray — Secondary body text, captions, project meta labels, placeholder fills — the quietest readable neutral. Must pass 3:1 contrast minimum on white card surfaces

graphite.$description: Graphite — Navigation text at rest, secondary borders, subdued button outlines, timeline connectors

mint-pulse.$description: Mint Pulse — Highlight wash behind emphasized inline links, selected skill tags, status indicators, and the 'available for work' pill — a single soft chromatic moment against the monochrome field

electric-yellow.$description: Electric Yellow — Inline text emphasis, the dominant hue inside the 3D hero illustration (infra cubes), and single-word accent in the hero headline — the loudest voice in the system, reserved for moments that must stop the eye

suisseintl.$description: Primary UI and body face — nav links, buttons, body copy, project descriptions, about text, skill labels. Medium weight (450) acts as the system's quiet semibold for buttons and small headings.

suisseintlcond.$description: Display headline face for hero statement and section openers ('BACKEND ENGINEER.', 'SELECTED WORK.', 'ABOUT ME.'). 0.90 line-height and 700 condensed weight stack letters into monumental blocks; 130px hero, 80px section openers, 48px card headings.

suisseintlmono.$description: Mono micro-voice for section kickers (// PROJECTS), tech stack tags, status chips, timeline markers, and inline code references. 12px is the only size — typographic system signature.

xs.$description: Caption / mono tag — section kickers, tech stack labels, status chips

xs-2.$description: Mono micro — project category labels, year markers, timeline annotations

xs-3.$description: Compact mono — inline code snippets, tech badges

sm.$description: Nav links, button text, footer links, card CTAs

sm-3.$description: Compact small text — meta info, dates, project roles

base.$description: Body copy — about section paragraphs, project descriptions, case study prose

base-2.$description: Emphasized body — key sentences in about/case study

base-4.$description: Contact section body / CTA description text

lg.$description: Hero subheadline — 'Queues, locks, distributed infrastructure — production systems that don't break.'

xl.$description: Large subheadline — about section lead paragraph

2xl.$description: Card heading — project card titles, skill category titles

4xl.$description: Medium display — stats numbers (10k users, 1.5yr exp)

5xl.$description: Project card display heading — condensed project titles inside cards

5xl-2.$description: Medium section opener — 'SELECTED WORK.', 'ABOUT ME.', 'GET IN TOUCH.'

5xl-3.$description: Large section opener — used for major section headers on the gray canvas

5xl-4.$description: Hero headline — 'BACKEND ENGINEER BUILDING SYSTEMS THAT SCALE.' Reserved for hero section only

canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Page ground, skill section, about section backgrounds

card.$description: Surface level 2: Project cards, nav pill, contact card, elevated content blocks

subtle-surface.$description: Surface level 3: Skill tag backgrounds, hovered ghost buttons, low-contrast panels

accent-wash.$description: Surface level 4: 'Available for work' pill, highlighted links, selected skill tags

accent-loud.$description: Surface level 5: Hero headline accent word, 3D infra cube color, electric emphasis moments
